name: thearchkit
description: Official marketplace for the archkit Claude Code plugin — context engineering for AI coding agents.

plugins.name: archkit
plugins.description: Inject architectural thought into one-shot LLM coding: the archkit MCP server (28 tools, CGR relay prompts, @archkit: resources), four guardrail hooks (SessionStart, Stop, PostToolUse, UserPromptSubmit), and the /archkit-init wizard.
